task_completion.description: Verify the three target pages ('Coding Standards', 'Deployment Procedures', 'Onboarding Checklist') have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the pages in the wiki 'Page index', or check if the links to these pages in the rendered sidebar are active (typically blue text). Red links indicate the pages do not exist yet.

task_completion.description: Verify placeholder text was added to the target pages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the agent viewing or editing the 'Coding Standards', 'Deployment Procedures', or 'Onboarding Checklist' pages with placeholder text (e.g., 'TODO') in the content area.

task_completion.description: Verify the special 'Sidebar' wiki page was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot showing the creation or editing of a wiki page explicitly titled 'Sidebar'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Quick Links' header is present in the rendered sidebar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the right-hand side of the wiki interface where the sidebar renders. It should display a formatted header reading 'Quick Links'.

task_completion.description: Verify the bulleted list of the three required links is present in the rendered sidebar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the rendered sidebar on the right-hand side of the wiki interface. It must contain a bulleted list with functional links to 'Coding Standards', 'Deployment Procedures', and 'Onboarding Checklist'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Redmine web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Redmine UI, clicking 'New wiki page', and using the text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the sidebar rendering.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (DOM inspector, console) should be open and actively modifying the page's HTML to show the sidebar.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show curl commands or direct database scripts used to create the wiki pages or sidebar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project identifier: 'engineering-handbook'. The special wiki page must be named exactly 'Sidebar' to trigger Redmine's built-in sidebar rendering feature. The sidebar must contain the header '### Quick Links' and exact links to 'Coding Standards', 'Deployment Procedures', and 'Onboarding Checklist'.
